← Back to MIRAC Technologies

Real Estate CRM Dubai — Lead to Contract Automation | MIRAC Technologies

Unify your leads and automate your sales pipeline in Dubai's competitive real estate market.

The Dubai real estate market is fast-paced and highly competitive. Agencies receive thousands of leads daily from multiple sources: Property Finder, Bayut, Dubizzle, Instagram, Facebook, and direct referrals. Without a dedicated real estate CRM built for this specific ecosystem, leads fall through the cracks, follow-ups are delayed, and valuable sales are lost to competitors. MIRAC Technologies offers a custom Real Estate CRM designed explicitly for Dubai agencies. Our software integrates seamlessly with all major property portals, automatically pulling leads into a centralized dashboard. The system employs AI lead scoring to prioritize high-intent buyers, ensuring agents focus their time on the most lucrative opportunities. It handles complete unit inventory management, tracks AED payment plans, automates commission calculations, and manages complex NOC tracking natively. Furthermore, our Arabic language support guarantees a smooth experience for local clients and investors. The CRM completely eliminates the need for scattered spreadsheets and fragmented communication channels. With

automated workflows for lead assignment, follow-up reminders, and document generation, agents can close deals faster and more efficiently. By providing detailed analytics on which portals yield the best ROI, agency owners can optimize their marketing spend. Starting at $12,000, our Dubai real estate CRM provides a unified, end-to-end platform from the initial inquiry right through to the final contract signing.
